response: Blockchain technology is a decentralized ledger that ensures transparency and security through cryptographic hashing. It operates on a network of nodes that validate transactions and update the ledger in a consensus-based manner. Each block contains a unique hash and links to the previous block, creating an immutable chain of data. A bullet list shows how transactions are verified and recorded across the network. The system handles data integrity by using cryptographic algorithms to secure each transaction. That's all I have to say.
